sourcePolicy: Original TOEFL-style Interview practice content. No official ETS questions are copied.
policyZh: 原创 TOEFL-style Interview 训练内容，不使用官方真题。

sets.title: Finding a Study Space
sets.descriptionZh: 围绕校园学习空间选择展开，适合练习个人经历、偏好、原因和建议。

questions.interviewerText: I would like to ask about places where students study on campus. Tell me about a place where you usually study, and explain why it works well for you.
questions.reviewHintZh: 先交代地点，再给出两个具体原因，比如安静、设备、距离或氛围。

questions.interviewerText: Some students prefer a quiet library, while others like a busy cafe. Which environment do you prefer when you need to finish important work?
questions.reviewHintZh: 明确选择一种环境，并用注意力、效率或压力管理来解释。

questions.interviewerText: Our university is considering adding more reservable study rooms. Do you think this would help students? Please give reasons and examples.
questions.reviewHintZh: 回答是否有帮助，再说明对小组项目、考试周或公平使用空间的影响。

questions.interviewerText: Imagine you could design one improvement for campus study areas. What change would you recommend, and how would it support students?
questions.reviewHintZh: 提出一个具体改进，并说明它解决的问题和带来的学习效果。

sets.title: Using Office Hours
sets.descriptionZh: 围绕 office hours 和学术支持展开，练习解释问题、比较选择和提出建议。

questions.interviewerText: Many instructors invite students to office hours. Describe a time when you asked a teacher or classmate for help with a difficult topic.
questions.reviewHintZh: 讲清楚困难是什么、你怎么求助、最后有什么结果。

questions.interviewerText: Would you rather meet a professor in person or send questions by email? Explain which option is more useful for you.
questions.reviewHintZh: 对比当面沟通和邮件沟通，强调你选择的效率或清晰度。

questions.interviewerText: Some students avoid office hours because they feel embarrassed. Why do you think this happens, and what could make them more comfortable?
questions.reviewHintZh: 先分析原因，再给出降低心理压力的办法。

questions.interviewerText: If you were advising a new student, how would you explain the best way to prepare for office hours?
questions.reviewHintZh: 给出可执行步骤，比如列问题、带材料、课后复盘。

sets.title: Managing a Group Project
sets.descriptionZh: 围绕小组项目合作展开，练习描述冲突、选择沟通方式和评价协作策略。

questions.interviewerText: Think about a group project you have worked on. What role did you usually take, and how did you help the group make progress?
questions.reviewHintZh: 说明你的角色和具体贡献，不要只说自己很努力。

questions.interviewerText: When a group member misses a deadline, what is the best way to handle the situation? Explain your answer with reasons.
questions.reviewHintZh: 强调沟通、重新分工和保留项目进度。

questions.interviewerText: Some courses grade students individually for group projects. Do you think this policy is fair? Why or why not?
questions.reviewHintZh: 表达是否公平，并说明它如何影响责任感和合作。

questions.interviewerText: What advice would you give to a team that wants to finish a large project without last-minute stress?
questions.reviewHintZh: 建议要具体，比如时间表、分工、检查点和共享文件。

sets.title: Planning a Campus Event
sets.descriptionZh: 围绕校园活动策划展开，练习活动经历、偏好和推广建议。

questions.interviewerText: Tell me about a campus event or community activity you enjoyed. What happened, and why was it memorable for you?
questions.reviewHintZh: 用事件、细节和个人感受构成一个小故事。

questions.interviewerText: Do you prefer academic talks, social events, or volunteer activities on campus? Explain your choice.
questions.reviewHintZh: 选一个类型，并解释它和你的目标或兴趣的关系。

questions.interviewerText: Our student center wants more people to attend events. What problem might be keeping students away?
questions.reviewHintZh: 可以从时间冲突、宣传不足或活动吸引力分析。

questions.interviewerText: Suggest one practical way to make campus events more useful or more interesting for busy students.
questions.reviewHintZh: 建议要和 busy students 对应，例如短时段、线上报名或明确收益。

sets.title: Getting Feedback on Writing
sets.descriptionZh: 围绕写作反馈展开，练习学习经历、修改偏好和反馈质量判断。

questions.interviewerText: Describe a time when feedback helped you improve a piece of writing or a presentation. What did you change afterward?
questions.reviewHintZh: 讲清楚反馈内容和你做出的具体修改。

questions.interviewerText: Would you rather receive feedback from a teacher, a classmate, or an online tool? Explain which source you trust most.
questions.reviewHintZh: 比较不同反馈来源的专业性、速度和具体程度。

questions.interviewerText: Some students only look at the grade and ignore written comments. Why is this a problem for learning?
questions.reviewHintZh: 说明只看分数会错过哪些改进机会。

questions.interviewerText: What system could a university writing center use to help students apply feedback more effectively?
questions.reviewHintZh: 提出流程设计，例如修改计划、二次预约或反馈清单。

sets.title: Managing a Busy Week
sets.descriptionZh: 围绕时间管理展开，练习个人习惯、取舍、原因和建议。

questions.interviewerText: Students often have several deadlines in the same week. Tell me how you usually organize your time when you are busy.
questions.reviewHintZh: 说出一个实际方法，比如日历、任务拆分或优先级。

questions.interviewerText: Do you work better by finishing one task at a time or by switching among several tasks? Explain your preference.
questions.reviewHintZh: 明确你的工作方式，并说明对专注或效率的影响。

questions.interviewerText: What is one common distraction that makes students lose time, and how can they control it?
questions.reviewHintZh: 选择一个干扰源，并给出可操作的控制办法。

questions.interviewerText: If a first-year student asked how to balance classes, friends, and rest, what advice would you give?
questions.reviewHintZh: 建议要平衡学习、社交和休息，不要只强调多学习。

sets.title: Learning Lab Safety
sets.descriptionZh: 围绕实验室安全培训展开，练习规则理解、政策评价和改进建议。

questions.interviewerText: Some science courses require lab safety training before students begin experiments. Describe a rule or procedure that you think is important.
questions.reviewHintZh: 解释一条安全规则，并说明它防止什么风险。

questions.interviewerText: Would you prefer safety training online or in person? Explain which format would help students remember the rules better.
questions.reviewHintZh: 对比线上便利和线下演示的效果。

questions.interviewerText: If students break a minor safety rule, should the instructor stop the lab immediately? Give your opinion and reasons.
questions.reviewHintZh: 讨论安全、学习机会和规则执行之间的平衡。

questions.interviewerText: What could a department do to make safety rules feel practical instead of just like paperwork?
questions.reviewHintZh: 建议用真实案例、演示、检查清单或短测验。

sets.title: Getting Around Campus
sets.descriptionZh: 围绕校园交通展开，练习服务体验、偏好、问题分析和建议。

questions.interviewerText: Tell me how students usually get around your campus or city. What transportation option do you use most often?
questions.reviewHintZh: 介绍常见交通方式，再聚焦你自己的选择。

questions.interviewerText: If you had to choose, would you improve campus buses, bike parking, or walking paths? Explain your choice.
questions.reviewHintZh: 选择一个改善对象，并说明它影响哪些学生。

questions.interviewerText: What problem might occur if too many students drive to campus every day? Explain the effects.
questions.reviewHintZh: 可从停车、拥堵、费用或环境影响展开。

questions.interviewerText: Recommend one transportation policy that would make campus life easier without costing students too much money.
questions.reviewHintZh: 提出低成本方案，并说明为什么学生容易接受。

sets.title: Technology in the Library
sets.descriptionZh: 围绕图书馆技术资源展开，练习资源使用、技术选择和服务评价。

questions.interviewerText: Many libraries now offer laptops, recording rooms, or research software. Describe a technology resource that would help your studies.
questions.reviewHintZh: 说明资源是什么、用在什么学习任务上、为什么有帮助。

questions.interviewerText: Would you rather borrow equipment from the library or use your own device? Explain the advantages of your choice.
questions.reviewHintZh: 从成本、便利、可靠性或熟悉程度进行比较。

questions.interviewerText: Should libraries spend more money on digital resources than on printed books? Give your opinion with reasons.
questions.reviewHintZh: 可以承认两者价值，再选择重点投入方向。

questions.interviewerText: How could library staff teach students to use new research tools without making the training feel too complicated?
questions.reviewHintZh: 建议短培训、示例任务、分层指南或预约帮助。

sets.title: Choosing Courses
sets.descriptionZh: 围绕选课展开，练习偏好表达、信息来源和规划建议。

questions.interviewerText: Students choose courses for many reasons. Tell me about a class you would like to take and why it interests you.
questions.reviewHintZh: 说明课程主题和你感兴趣的具体原因。

questions.interviewerText: When choosing a course, is the professor, schedule, or subject most important to you? Explain your answer.
questions.reviewHintZh: 选择一个最重要因素，并解释它如何影响学习体验。

questions.interviewerText: Some students choose easy classes to protect their grades. Do you think this is a good strategy?
questions.reviewHintZh: 讨论成绩、挑战和长期能力之间的取舍。

questions.interviewerText: What advice would you give to someone building a balanced course schedule for the first time?
questions.reviewHintZh: 建议结合难度、兴趣、时间安排和休息空间。

sets.title: Sustainability on Campus
sets.descriptionZh: 围绕校园可持续发展展开，练习政策评价、行为改变和建议。

questions.interviewerText: Many schools encourage students to reduce waste. Describe one habit that could make campus life more sustainable.
questions.reviewHintZh: 选择一个具体习惯，并说明它如何减少浪费。

questions.interviewerText: Would students respond better to rewards for sustainable behavior or penalties for wasteful behavior? Explain your view.
questions.reviewHintZh: 对比奖励和惩罚对学生行为的影响。

questions.interviewerText: Should universities require all students to take a short sustainability workshop? Why or why not?
questions.reviewHintZh: 从教育效果、时间成本和校园责任展开。

questions.interviewerText: Recommend one realistic sustainability project that students could help run during a regular semester.
questions.reviewHintZh: 项目要现实可执行，比如回收、二手交换或节能宣传。

sets.title: Preparing for a Career
sets.descriptionZh: 围绕职业准备展开，练习经历描述、选择实习或课程、评价支持服务。

questions.interviewerText: Tell me about a skill you are trying to develop for your future career. Why is this skill important to you?
questions.reviewHintZh: 说明技能名称、职业关联和你正在怎样提升。

questions.interviewerText: Would you rather gain experience through an internship, a part-time job, or a campus project? Explain your choice.
questions.reviewHintZh: 对比实践方式，并说明你选择的学习价值。

questions.interviewerText: Some students wait until their final year to visit the career center. Why might this be a disadvantage?
questions.reviewHintZh: 说明太晚准备会错过哪些机会或反馈。

questions.interviewerText: What service should a career center offer to help students feel more confident before interviews?
questions.reviewHintZh: 建议模拟面试、简历反馈、行业导师或表达训练。
